headline: Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) Beats Expectations in Strong Q2 CY2026
summary: Oilfield services company Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 3.7% year on year to $5.71 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.55 per share was 2.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
